Terms and Conditions

The rules for using MalaysianOpenTennis.com.

Welcome to MalaysianOpenTennis.com.

These Terms and Conditions explain the rules for using our website. By accessing or using MalaysianOpenTennis.com, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please stop using the website.

1. About MalaysianOpenTennis.com

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website focused on Malaysian tennis events, tournament history, tennis rules, rankings, player resources, and related sports education.

We are not an official tennis federation, tournament organiser, player representative, government body, betting operator, or sports authority unless clearly stated.

Our content is provided for general information and educational purposes only.

2. Use of the Website

You agree to use MalaysianOpenTennis.com lawfully and responsibly.

You must not:

  • Use the website for illegal purposes
  • Attempt to hack, disrupt, or damage the website
  • Copy or scrape large parts of the website without permission
  • Submit false, misleading, abusive, or harmful information
  • Impersonate another person, player, coach, club, organiser, or organisation
  • Use the website to distribute spam, malware, or harmful content
  • Violate the rights of other users, players, organisations, or third parties

We may restrict access to the website if we believe these Terms have been violated.

3. Informational Content Only

The content on MalaysianOpenTennis.com is provided for general sports information and educational purposes.

We aim to provide accurate and useful content, but we do not guarantee that all information is complete, current, or error-free.

Information such as tournament dates, venues, rankings, player details, event status, and results may change. Users should always confirm important details with official organisers, governing bodies, venues, or relevant authorities.

4. No Official Affiliation

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent website.

Unless clearly stated, we are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to:

  • Any tennis federation
  • Any tournament organiser
  • Any professional tennis tour
  • Any player or coach
  • Any academy or club
  • Any venue
  • Any government agency
  • Any betting or gambling operator

References to organisations, events, players, or venues are for informational and editorial purposes only.

5. Editorial Accuracy

We make reasonable efforts to publish accurate and useful information.

However, errors may occur. If you believe any information on the website is incorrect, outdated, or incomplete, you may contact us and request a review.

We reserve the right to decide whether and how to update, edit, or remove content.

6. Player, Tournament, and Venue Information

MalaysianOpenTennis.com may publish information about players, tournaments, clubs, academies, venues, rankings, and sporting events.

This information may come from public sources, official listings, organiser announcements, submitted updates, or editorial research.

For junior players, we aim to avoid unnecessary personal details and focus on tennis-related public information.

If you are a player, parent, guardian, coach, organiser, or authorised representative and want to request a correction, please contact us.

7. User Submissions

Users may submit information such as:

  • Tournament updates
  • Event results
  • Player profile corrections
  • Venue updates
  • News tips
  • Editorial feedback
  • General enquiries

By submitting information to us, you confirm that:

  • The information is accurate to the best of your knowledge
  • You have the right to submit it
  • Your submission does not violate another person's rights
  • We may review, edit, publish, or reject the submission

Submitting information does not guarantee publication.

8. Intellectual Property

Unless otherwise stated, the content on MalaysianOpenTennis.com, including text, layout, design, graphics, and website structure, belongs to MalaysianOpenTennis.com or its content providers.

You may use the website for personal, non-commercial reading and reference.

You may not copy, republish, reproduce, sell, modify, or distribute our content for commercial purposes without written permission.

You may quote short excerpts with proper credit and a link back to the original page.

9. Images and Media

Images, logos, graphics, and media used on the website may belong to MalaysianOpenTennis.com, third-party licensors, public sources, or content providers.

If you believe any image or media has been used incorrectly, please contact us with details so we can review the matter.

10. Third-Party Links

MalaysianOpenTennis.com may contain links to third-party websites.

These links may include tennis organisations, official tournament pages, clubs, venues, academies, sports resources, news sources, or commercial websites.

We are not responsible for:

  • Third-party website content
  • External website accuracy
  • External privacy practices
  • Products or services offered by third parties
  • Any loss or damage caused by third-party websites

You access third-party websites at your own risk.

11. Future Affiliate and Commercial Content

MalaysianOpenTennis.com may include affiliate links, sponsorships, advertisements, or commercial partnerships in the future.

If we include affiliate links, we may receive a commission when users click a link, sign up, or make a purchase through that link.

Affiliate or sponsored relationships will be disclosed where appropriate.

Commercial relationships do not guarantee positive coverage. We aim to keep editorial content independent and useful to readers.

12. Betting and Gambling-Related Content

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is currently a sports-first editorial website. In the future, we may publish sports betting education, responsible gambling information, or sportsbook comparison content where relevant.

Any betting-related content will be intended for adults only and for informational purposes.

We do not operate a betting platform, accept bets, process payments, or provide gambling services.

Users are responsible for understanding and following the laws that apply in their location. Betting and gambling involve financial risk and may not be legal in all jurisdictions.

If you choose to engage with any third-party betting or gambling website, you do so at your own risk.

13. Responsible Gambling

If MalaysianOpenTennis.com publishes betting-related educational content in the future, we will encourage responsible gambling principles, including:

  • Understanding the risks
  • Setting limits
  • Avoiding gambling when under financial or emotional stress
  • Not treating betting as a source of income
  • Seeking help if gambling becomes harmful

Users should only participate in betting or gambling activities where legally permitted and only if they are of legal age.

14. Disclaimer of Warranties

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.

We do not guarantee that:

  • The website will always be available
  • The website will be free from errors
  • The content will always be complete or up to date
  • The website will be free from viruses or technical issues
  • External links will remain active or accurate

You use the website at your own risk.

15. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, MalaysianOpenTennis.com and its owners, editors, contributors, partners, and service providers will not be liable for any loss or damage arising from:

  • Use of the website
  • Reliance on website content
  • Inaccurate or outdated information
  • Third-party links or services
  • Website downtime or technical issues
  • Unauthorised access or data loss
  • Betting, gambling, or financial decisions made by users

This includes direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages.

16. Indemnity

You agree to indemnify and hold MalaysianOpenTennis.com harmless from any claims, losses, damages, liabilities, costs, or expenses arising from:

  • Your use of the website
  • Your violation of these Terms
  • Your submission of false or unlawful information
  • Your violation of any third-party rights
  • Your misuse of website content

17. Changes to the Website

We may update, modify, suspend, or remove any part of the website at any time without prior notice.

We may also update, edit, or remove content when information changes or when we believe updates are necessary.

18. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time.

When changes are made, the "Last updated" date at the top of this page will be revised. Continued use of the website after changes are posted means you accept the updated Terms.

19. Governing Law

These Terms are intended to be governed by the laws of Malaysia, unless otherwise required by applicable law.

Any disputes should first be addressed by contacting us directly so we can attempt to resolve the matter.

20. Contact Us

If you have questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact:

MalaysianOpenTennis.com
Email: info@malaysianopentennis.com

Last updated: 19 June 2026

Malaysian Open Tennis

Tournaments, records and resources for Malaysian tennis — independent and editorial-first.

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website. We provide educational guides, tournament resources, and editorial content for Malaysian tennis fans and players.
© 2026 malaysianopentennis.com. All rights reserved. Independent site — not affiliated with the ATP, WTA, BWF, PSA, LTAM, or any tournament organiser.
